narrative_scene_description: The spatial layout begins with S.S. Surgical, located to the left of BM Lock Centre. Beside BM Lock Centre is Shree Ganesh Aluminium, where various ladders are displayed on the sidewalk and a scooter is parked. To the right of the aluminum shop is Rubi Rexine, a furnishing store identified by Kurl-on mattress branding; a white van and a blue motorcycle are positioned in front of this shop. Adjacent to Rubi Rexine is Rubi Carpets, which has a red pickup truck parked nearby. Beside Rubi Carpets is Imperial Halwa. To the right of the halwa shop is the CA Arcade building, which features blue shutters and a sign indicating space for rent. Adjacent to CA Arcade is a corner building housing Karatt Kuries India Pvt. Ltd and a Berger Paint outlet. Around the corner from the paint shop is C.K.P Traders Agromart, characterized by agricultural equipment like wheelbarrows and tillers. To the right of the agromart is Peoples Tyres, also branded as Goodyear Autocare, which is surrounded by stacks of tyres and signs for Apollo and Yokohama. Adjacent to the tyre shop is a parking area marked by an IDFC First Bharat sign where several motorcycles are parked. Beside the parking area is a large gray corrugated metal building with several closed shutters and a brown car parked in front. To the right of this metal building is an open area where a large orange and yellow 'Kerala Roadways' truck is positioned. Further to the right is Al Alumin Design, which features a bright red storefront. Adjacent to Al Alumin Design is JPS Associate, a store displaying Duroflex and Repose mattresses. Beside the mattress shop is a pink and gray building. At the end of this spatial chain is Wire & Wirenet, where an elderly man with a red scarf stands near rolls of colored plastic mesh and wire.
temporal_progression_description: At the beginning of the clip, the vehicle passes a row of hardware-related businesses including S.S. Surgical, BM Lock Centre, and Shree Ganesh Aluminium, where ladders are seen on the pavement. Shortly after, the vehicle passes Rubi Rexine and Rubi Carpets; during this segment, workers are visible handling pink foam near a parked white van and a red pickup truck. As the vehicle continues forward, it passes Imperial Halwa and the CA Arcade building, which has units for rent. Further along the road, the vehicle rounds a corner past Karatt Kuries and a Berger Paint shop, reaching the C.K.P Traders Agromart. Near the middle of the clip, the vehicle travels past the Goodyear Autocare (Peoples Tyres) shop and an IDFC First Bharat sign. As the vehicle continues, it passes a gray corrugated metal warehouse with a parked brown car, just as a large red and yellow Kerala Roadways container truck passes in the opposite direction. Toward the end of the clip, the vehicle passes Al Alumin Design and the JPS Associate mattress store. Finally, near the end of the clip, the journey concludes as the vehicle passes Wire & Wirenet, where rolls of mesh are displayed and a pedestrian is standing by the entrance.
